aries: Apr 28, 2026- Today you might take up some sort of occult study, such as astrology, numerology, or alchemy that seems like Greek to you at first, Aries. As a result, you could be tempted to abandon it. Don't! Once you get past the jargon, you'll probably find it fascinating. Keep a dictionary handy, and don't worry if you have to go over something several times. You have the brains to do it. Now just put in the time.
taurus: Apr 28, 2026- A friend might be in such a dour mood that you wonder if this is the same person you know and love, Taurus. During the day you might be tempted to try to analyze what's going on, but this is apt to raise more questions than answers. Probably this is a case of too many problems hitting your friend at once. Don't pry, but make sure your friend knows you're there if needed.
gemini: Apr 28, 2026- A friend or romantic partner might need your advice, Gemini, and want to discuss a few things that you don't really understand. This could concern this person's job, which involves a lot of technicalities with which you're unfamiliar. Don't be afraid to stop occasionally and ask for an explanation. If you're going to be of any help, you have to have some idea of what this person is talking about.
cancer: Apr 28, 2026- Today you might read a book on exercise or nutrition that seems a bit unsettling, Cancer. According to the book, you're doing everything wrong! Remember that what the author is probably outlining is a certain practice that worked for him or her. Everyone is different. Don't change your habits for practices that don't feel right. Consult a professional if you're still concerned. Such a person is more than capable of discerning what's right for you.
leo: Apr 28, 2026- Memories and emotions welling up from the past might excite your creative impulses today, Leo. You may not quite be able to understand what all of this means, but the pictures should keep coming to you nonetheless. It might be a good idea to take some notes, even though you might not comprehend all you write. This may be more a process of releasing ancient traumas than creating great masterpieces, but even so, it's worth pursuing.
virgo: Apr 28, 2026- A subject you're researching, perhaps for a class or workshop, might prove more difficult than you expected, Virgo. The resources you consult might be very scholarly and thus difficult to read. If you can't find anything comprehensible, try to rent or buy a video on the subject. It's more important to understand the material than force yourself to approach it in the accepted scholarly manner. It's also important that you enjoy it.
libra: Apr 28, 2026- A neighbor or relative might volunteer to help you with some chores around the house, Libra, but you could sense that his or her heart isn't in it. This person is probably thinking about things and just needs some kind words and a little advice. Just accept that even though you have help, you'll probably end up doing most of the work yourself. Offer what support you can, and think of it as good karma.
scorpio: Apr 28, 2026- Paperwork involving money could be a real drag for you today, Scorpio. You'll have to get it done, but you'd rather be elsewhere. It might also seem a little confusing. If you get to it early and concentrate, you should finish it quickly and then get on to what you want to do. After a morning of intense, tedious work, you'll probably be ready for some entertainment like a movie or sports event. Have fun!
sagittarius: Apr 28, 2026- A contract of some kind, perhaps involving the home, might need some careful consideration today, Sagittarius. You could find it a little difficult to understand, as it could be full of fine print and legalese. Don't be afraid to ask someone with a little more savvy to explain what you're trying to read. It's important that you know all the ins and outs before signing anything, for your own peace of mind, if nothing else.
capricorn: Apr 28, 2026- You might pick up some rather disturbing thoughts from a friend, neighbor, or relative, Capricorn. This person could be upset over something and not communicating his or her feelings. It isn't appropriate to try to coax this person into sharing with you now. They aren't upset with you, but they might be if you push! Back off and let this person come to terms with the problem. Your friend will talk the time is right.
aquarius: Apr 28, 2026- Some gossip about a friend could reach your ears today, Aquarius, and it might seem a bit shocking at first. Money could be involved. However, don't accept what you hear at face value. Whoever got the rumor going is apt to be less concerned with the truth than serving a personal agenda. Call your friend and try to learn the facts without prying. They're probably far less dire than the gossip implies.
pisces: Apr 28, 2026- Today you might find yourself the center of attention, Pisces. Friends could ask for some information they know you have. It might involve telling a story or giving practical advice. Whatever it is, you might find it difficult to explain without going into some pretty heavy detail. You can do it! Talk slowly and let what you have to say unfold on its own. Your audience will probably be rapt.
